biological_replicate: HepG2 cells cultured in high glucose (450 mg/dl) medium.
technical_replicate: Estrogen sulfation was significantly activated in high glucose treated HepG2 cells in the presence of both 0.1 µM and 10 µM E2 as substrate.
factor_value: low glucose (40 mg/dl), normal glucose (140 mg/dl) and high glucose (450 mg/dl)
number_of_biological_replicates: Two distinct cell lines are mentioned.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates described (HepG2 and Huh7 cells)
